market_context: X/Twitter sentiment is moderately bullish with tech and AI stocks dominating positive chatter amid low VIX at 15.86. Pre-market futures point to modest gains following strong 5-day rallies in QQQ and SPY. No major negative events flagged but 10Y yield at 4.45% warrants monitoring.

predictions.reasoning: SPY up on continued momentum from +2.1% 5-day gain and positive X chatter on indices; low VIX supports risk-on flows into close.
QQQ leads with +3.8% 5-day surge and strong X sentiment around NVDA/MSFT; pre-market futures align with further tech buying.
NVDA benefits from AI narrative on X and QQQ strength; options flow likely supportive despite elevated valuation.
TSLA shows short-term overextension after recent run; mixed X sentiment and profit-taking likely cap upside into close.
